name: RadioIcon
visual_summary: RadioIcon is a radio icon UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable input behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: RadioIcon
Description: RadioIcon is a radio icon UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable input behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: icon, input, mantine, radio

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):

import { rem } from '../../core';

export interface RadioIconProps extends React.ComponentProps<'svg'> {
  size?: string | number;
}

export function RadioIcon({ size, style, ...others }: RadioIconProps) {
  return (
    <svg
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
      fill="none"
      viewBox="0 0 5 5"
      style={{ width: rem(size), height: rem(size), ...style }}
      aria-hidden
      {...others}
